sections.paragraph:
Εὔτυχος, ου, ὁ (IG III, 1095; 1113; 1122; SEG XLI, 1700, 4 [I/II a.d.] al.; CIL III 2784; 3028 al.; PPetr I, 12, 8; Preisigke, Namenbuch; Joseph.; Hemer, Acts 237) Eutychus, a young Christian in Troas Ac 20:9.—M-M.

IG IG = Inscriptiones Graecae—List 3

SEG SEG = Supplementum Epigraphicum Graecum—List 3

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

CIL CIL = Corpus Inscriptionum Latinarum—List 3

PPetr PPetr = The Flinders Petrie Papyri—List 4

Preisigke, Namenbuch Preisigke, Namenbuch = Namenbuch 1922

Joseph Joseph This abbr. used when no specific texts are cited (s. Jos.); I a.d.—List 5

Hemer, Acts Hemer, Acts = CH., The Book of Acts in the Setting of Hellenistic History—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 414
